root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ,pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control)as member_group_name --, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description , sc_com_m_receipt_item.contact_status , sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount)as principal_amount , sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount)as interest_amount , sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount)as item_amount
FROM sc_com_m_receipt ,sc_com_m_receipt_item ,sc_lon_m_rule ,sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group WHERE (sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no) AND (sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type) AND (sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id) and sc_com_m_receipt.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no AND (sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0') AND (sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON') AND (sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount <> 0) AND sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id not in ( 'TBK' , 'CLR' , 'AOP','TRL' ,'TNL' ) /*WHERE*/ --AND sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date = '23/07/2025' group by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control --, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description , sc_com_m_receipt_item.contact_status
